title: Ex-Moelis Banker to Plead Guilty in Global Insider Trading Case
description: A former Moelis & Co. investment banker plans to return to the US from France to plead guilty to tipping off members of a global insider-trading ring.
content: A former Moelis & Co. investment banker plans to return to the US from France to plead guilty to tipping off members of a global insider-trading ring.
